context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Release planning has a plan-only supply preflight, operator handoffs prefer it for current-workspace checks, and the reference-driver supply SDK now uses product-neutral names.
current_tasks: Commit aece3013 added refarm release preflight --selection <id> --json for plan-only release posture checks without gates, builds, publish dry-runs, or runtime dispatch.
Commit b5cf167c updated refarm agent/check/common help to recommend refarm release preflight --selection default --json as the cheap first current-workspace release posture check.

Commit 5c4e987e renamed the reference-driver supply map SDK surface to buildReferenceDriverSupplyMap, ReferenceDriverSupplyMap, and ReferenceDriverSupplyEntry, removing the Refarm-prefixed map names before publication.
External consumer handoff templates intentionally remain on refarm release plan --cwd <dir> --selection default --json; Refarm-specific supply posture is not forced onto downstream checkouts.
next_actions: Use refarm release preflight --selection default --json or --selection vault-seed-ready --json before heavier release checks to inspect candidate/internal/hold posture cheaply.
Continue auditing SDK exports before publication; keep product CLI names where they describe the Refarm app, but make reusable primitives product-neutral before they become public contracts.
Decide whether release readiness scripts need a build-free JS/JSON source for supply posture, or whether the app/SDK preflight surface is enough for now.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
